name: Edge Case E4: Add to cart with negative quantity
description:
1. Launch browser
2. Navigate to url 'http://automationexercise.com'
3. Verify that home page is visible successfully
4. Click 'View Product' for the first product
5. Set quantity input to -1
6. Click 'Add to cart'
7. Click 'View Cart'
8. Verify that quantity = -1 is not accepted
descriptionHtml:
1. Launch browser
  2. Navigate to url 'http://automationexercise.com'
  3. Verify that home page is visible successfully
  4. Click 'View Product' for the first product
  5. Set quantity input to -1
  6. Click 'Add to cart'
  7. Click 'View Cart'
  8. Verify that quantity = -1 is not accepted
statusMessage: The application accepted a negative quantity (-1) into the cart without validation. did not expect [-1] but found [-1]

testStage.description:
1. Launch browser
2. Navigate to url 'http://automationexercise.com'
3. Verify that home page is visible successfully
4. Click 'View Product' for the first product
5. Set quantity input to -1
6. Click 'Add to cart'
7. Click 'View Cart'
8. Verify that quantity = -1 is not accepted
